apps.purpose: Provide quick Information Center reference support for Monterey Bay Aquarium volunteers.
apps.shortDescription: Information Center handbook with search, dropdown sections, quick references, cache refresh, and troubleshooting.
apps.testingStatus: Needs PC Chrome, iPhone Safari, and offline confirmation after Hub 2 upload.
apps.notes: First installed app in Hub 2. Return to Hub path should resolve to ../../index.html.

apps.purpose: Provide a compact educational guide to sight, hearing, smell, taste, and touch.
apps.shortDescription: Five senses learning guide with searchable dropdowns, activities, review questions, cache refresh, troubleshooting, and offline support.
apps.testingStatus: Needs PC Chrome, iPhone Safari, and offline confirmation after Hub upload.
apps.notes: Return to Hub path should resolve to ../../index.html. App folder should be apps/five-senses-pwa/.
